name: backend-cybersecurity-portfolio
description: Monorepo de portafolio con Astro y Express

scripts.dev: npm run dev --prefix frontend & npm run dev --prefix backend
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.build:frontend: mkdir -p frontend/dist && npm run build --prefix frontend > frontend/dist/astro_build_log.txt 2>&1 || true && env > frontend/dist/env_debug.txt && ls -laR frontend/dist > frontend/dist/build_debug.txt && rm -rf dist && cp -r frontend/dist ./dist
